title: Signal Windows — An After-Hours City Study
prompt: Instrumental only. A refined 96 BPM downtempo electronic piece for deep work after dark: a soft rounded kick with generous space, restrained brushed electronic percussion, warm analog sub bass, muted glassy synth chords, and one small distant arpeggio. The feeling is modern city lights seen from a quiet window: focused, poised, and slightly luminous, never frantic. Keep the mix wide and elegant with a gentle low-end pulse; use a short arrival, a settled groove, one small harmonic opening, then a quiet release. No vocals, no lyrics, no EDM drop, no festival synth lead, no harsh hi-hats, no glitch effects, no busy fills, no abrupt climax, no sirens, no sound effects.
commercialUseNote: Verify the active ElevenLabs paid-plan music terms before commercial publication.
